source.name: Chapter 1.5: 6.4 Knowledge Check - command prompt template
source.instructions: **In this course’s `level5/config.yml`, `SearchReadyLLMCommandGenerator` may set `prompt_template` to `data/prompts/command_prompt_v3_slot_names.jinja2`. What is the main purpose of that prompt file?**

answers.answer: To register Python tool functions with Rasa
To steer the LLM command generator toward domain slot names (e.g. `amount`) instead of invented prefixed names
To define the `transfer_money_tools` flow in YAML

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT describe the role of the custom command-generator prompt
source.guidance: The Jinja template customizes examples and wording for the LLM command generator; it does not register tools.
